title: Sea Drops Anti-Fog Lens Cleaner for Diving Masks - 1.25 oz White
description:
When you’re snorkeling or diving, a foggy dive mask can be problematic. A quick application of Sea Drops anti-fog and cleaner clears up dirty and foggy lenses – giving you a crystal-clear view underwater. It’s easy to use waterside. Just squeeze, rub, rinse and wear. The gentle formula will not harm surrounding silicone or rubber support frames. So, toss a bottle of Sea Drops Anti-Fog and Cleaner in your dive kit and see what you’ve been missing.

Sea Drops Anti-Fog Lens Cleaner for Diving Masks - 1.25 oz White

When you’re snorkeling or diving, a foggy dive mask can be problematic. A quick application of Sea Drops anti-fog and cleaner clears up dirty and foggy lenses – giving you a crystal-clear view underwater. It’s easy to use waterside. Just squeeze, rub, rinse and wear. The gentle formula will not harm surrounding silicone or rubber support frames. So, toss a bottle of Sea Drops Anti-Fog and Cleaner in your dive kit and see what you’ve been missing.

Key Features

  • Prevent dive masks from fogging underwater with these powerful anti-fog drops that performs even in cold water
  • Clean scuba masks with this 2-in-1 formula that’s non-toxic, biodegradable, and alcohol-free
  • Apply easily on all glass and plastic scuba, snorkel and dive mask lenses; won’t harm silicone or rubber
  • Use on eyeglasses, face masks, binoculars, and telescopes; not recommended for swim goggles
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 40114-215
  • UPC: 177691415427
  • Color: White
  • Size: Small
